locations.name: 米纳斯吉拉斯州
locations.summary: 米纳斯吉拉斯州（葡萄牙語：Minas Gerais，[ˈminɐz ʒeˈɾajs] ；直译：「一般〔普通〕的矿山」）是巴西东南部一个州，人口约两千万。是巴西第二人口大州，国内生产总值也排名全国第三。该州以山、瀑布、历史名城、宝石，以及盛…

locations.name: 圣保罗州
locations.summary: 圣保罗州（葡萄牙語：São Paulo，葡萄牙語發音：[sɐ̃w̃ 'paw.lo]）是巴西的一个州，以圣保罗的名字命名。圣保罗州是巴西重要的工业和经济区。 地理 圣保罗州的面积248,209.426平方公里，人口44,411,238人（…

locations.name: 里約熱內盧州
locations.summary: 里約熱內盧州（葡萄牙語：Rio de Janeiro，ˈhiw dʒi ʒʌˈnejɾu） 是巴西的一個州。 里約熱內盧州面積43,696.1km²。該州首府是1763年由葡萄牙人建立的里約熱內盧，該市也是州內最大的城市。

locations.name: 圣埃斯皮里图州
locations.summary: 聖埃斯皮里圖州（葡萄牙語：Espírito Santo，(e)s.'pi.ɾi.tu 'sɐ̃.tu）是巴西的一個州，其州名是基督宗教中「聖靈」的意思。位於東南部大西洋岸。面積46,077.519平方公里，2005年人口3,412,746…

locations.name: Serra dos Órgãos
locations.summary: The Serra dos Órgãos ("Organ Range") is a mountain range in the state of Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

relations.subject: Itatiaia spinetail
relations.evidence: The Itatiaia spinetail is found in the mountains of southeastern Brazil's Minas Gerais, São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, and Espírito Santo states

relations.subject: Itatiaia spinetail
relations.evidence: It is named for Serra do Itatiaia and also occurs in Serra do Caraça and Serra dos Órgãos

relations.subject: Itatiaia spinetail
relations.evidence: It inhabits semi-humid to humid montane scrublands, Chusquea bamboo thickets, and areas of tall grass near scrub
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Itatiaia spinetail
relations.evidence: Stresses to its habitat due to climate change are expected to adversely affect the species. It is considered uncommon to locally fairly common and occurs in two national parks
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
